name: Tamriel Data
author: Cross-Project Coordination
description: Adds game data files required by mods such as Tamriel Rebuilt, Project Cyrodiil, and Skyrim Home of the Nords.
usage_notes: Download the Tamriel Data (Vanilla) file.

name: Skill Framework (OpenMW)
author: Ralts
description: OpenMW Lua framework for adding custom skills and exposing them to compatible UI mods.

name: OAAB_Data
author: OAAB_Data Team
description: Shared Vvardenfell-focused assets required by Devilish Touch of Madness.
usage_notes: Download the OAAB_Data main file. Optional HD and developer archives are not required.

name: Tamriel Rebuilt
author: Tamriel Rebuilt Team
description: Mainland Morrowind content required by Devilish Touch of Madness.
usage_notes: Requires Tribunal, Bloodmoon, and Tamriel_Data v12 or newer. Fetcher already installs those prerequisites.

name: Stats Window Extender (OpenMW)
author: Ralts
description: A replacement for the Stats window with built-in tweaks and an API for modders to add new content.

name: Bardcraft (OpenMW)
author: Ralts
description: Playable instruments, songwriting, performances, and bard progression for OpenMW.
usage_notes: Requires Tamriel Data, Skill Framework, and Stats Window Extender.

name: Playable Creature Race Pack
author: PsychoGherkin
description: Adds playable versions of Morrowind's humanoid creatures.
usage_notes: Requires Tribunal and Bloodmoon. Install the V0.09 main file; the optional Ashzomb_hand file is only a legacy crash workaround.

name: Mario Race 1.0
author: ModDB uploader
description: Adds Mario from Mario Tennis as a playable Morrowind race.
usage_notes: Manual ModDB download. The installer opens the official page and detects Mario_Race_1.0.rar in your Downloads folder.

name: NIF test level
author: Kurpulio
description: An in-game level for browsing interesting NIF assets.
usage_notes: Requires Tribunal and Bloodmoon.

name: Devilish Touch of Madness (OpenMW)
author: DetailDevil
description: A skooma-induced OpenMW quest and hallucination adventure.
usage_notes: Requires OpenMW 0.50+, Tamriel_Data, OAAB_Data, and Tamriel Rebuilt. Do not install the author's separate shrink, skooma, or Wabbajack mods alongside it.

name: Rafael's Shader Pack
author: rafaeldk and contributors
description: Optimized post-processing shaders for OpenMW.
usage_notes: Install the main shader pack. Enhanced Water, PBR Lighting, and Enhanced Shadows are optional and are not installed by Fetcher.

name: OpenMW Hookshot
author: imarchnemesis
description: Adds a Zelda-style hookshot for pulling actors, items, or the player.
usage_notes: Requires Tribunal, Bloodmoon, and OpenMW 0.49+.

name: Moon Sugar Plantation
author: Danjb
description: Adds a moon-sugar plantation northwest of Caldera.
usage_notes: No additional mod dependencies are declared by the author.

name: Morrowind Optimization Patch
author: MOP Team
description: Optimizes vanilla meshes, improves performance, and fixes mesh errors.

name: Project Atlas
author: Project Atlas Team
description: Reduces draw calls by atlasing frequently used vanilla meshes and textures.
usage_notes: Installs the core module and its required vanilla texture atlases. Optional mesh and compatibility variants are excluded.

name: Character Sound Overhaul
author: Anumaril21
description: Provides the character movement and equipment sounds used by openmw-footsteps.
usage_notes: Required sound assets for openmw-footsteps. Installs both the main archive and the optional higher-bitrate sounds.

name: openmw-footsteps
author: fallchildren and contributors
description: Adds material-, race-, speed-, and armor-aware footsteps to OpenMW using Character Sound Overhaul assets.
usage_notes: Downloaded for future compatibility, but not enabled: this revision throws repeated animation-key Lua errors when no matching sound files are enumerated.

name: Zerkish ModUtils (OpenMW)
author: Zerkish
description: Shared OpenMW Lua utility and UI library required by Zerkish Hotkeys Improved.

name: Halo Combat Evolved Energy Sword
author: Karsten Snyder
description: Adds the Halo: Combat Evolved energy sword as a usable Morrowind weapon.

name: Halo 3 Gravity Hammer
author: Karsten Snyder
description: Adds the Halo 3 gravity hammer as a usable Morrowind weapon.

name: The Red Tower - Red Mountain Terrain Overhaul
author: SaintJ
description: Overhauls Red Mountain terrain and improves the walkable route toward Dagoth Ur.
usage_notes: Uses version 1.5, which removed the former Dr_Data and OAAB_Data dependencies.

name: Master Chief Armor
author: Tehr4p3
description: Adds several Halo Mjolnir armor color sets and an ODST-style helmet.

name: Welcome to McDagoth's
author: Ignatious
description: Adds a McDagoth's restaurant in Balmora with food, ingredients, armor, and characters.

name: Zerkish Hotkeys Improved (For OpenMW)
author: Zerkish
description: Adds additional hotbars, improved hotkey interfaces, and an optional configurable hotbar HUD.
usage_notes: Requires Zerkish ModUtils, loaded first.

name: Balmora Underworld
author: Fulgore
description: Adds sewers, markets, criminal factions, caves, quests, and a Dwemer ruin beneath Balmora.

name: Imperial Billiards - Playable Pool Tables
author: Dillonn241
description: Adds playable five-ball billiards tables and AI opponents at locations across Vvardenfell.
usage_notes: Installs the all-in-one Vvardenfell file. The optional Project Cyrodiil addon is excluded. Requires Tamriel Data.

name: Nifty Spell Pack (OpenMW)
author: Ralts
description: Adds astral projection, death reversal, pocket dimensions, contingencies, and other OpenMW magic effects.
usage_notes: Downloaded for future compatibility, but not enabled: this Fetcher OpenMW build does not yet expose the mutable magic-effect content API required by the mod. Magic Window Extender is optional.

name: Glider and Shield Surfing
author: blurpandra
description: Adds shield surfing and unlockable hang gliders for OpenMW.
usage_notes: Installs the standard Dwemer Glider variant alongside the required core.

name: Yul Marshee and the Visage of Mzund
author: The Provincial Privateers
description: Adds exploration quests, dungeons, treasures, and a buildable Dwemer airship.
usage_notes: Requires Tamriel Data and OAAB Data, which are already installed earlier in this list.

download_info.file_name: Yul Marshee and the Visage of Mzund

plugins: Yul Marshee and the Visage of Mzund.ESP

name: Yul Marshee and the Visage of Mzund - OpenMW Patch
author: PexCom
description: Makes Yul Marshee's airship and final sequence work in OpenMW.
usage_notes: Requires and must load after the original Yul Marshee and the Visage of Mzund mod.

download_info.file_name: Yul Marshee And The Visage Of Mzund   OpenMW Patch

plugins: Yul Marshee and the Visage of Mzund.omwaddon
Yul Marshee and the Visage of Mzund.omwscripts

name: Project Cyrodiil
author: Project Cyrodiil Team
description: Adds the province of Cyrodiil to Morrowind as part of Project Tamriel.
usage_notes: Requires Tamriel Data. Download the Cyr_Main main file.

name: Starwind v3.1 - A Star Wars Conversion
author: Starwind Team
description: A total conversion that brings a Star Wars campaign, worlds, equipment, and characters to OpenMW.
usage_notes: Download the Nexus main file named Starwind Version 3.1. The Fetcher updater applies the separate vanilla/multiplayer compatibility release afterward.

name: Westly Race Bundle
author: Westly and Danae123
description: A modular bundle of twelve playable race mods by Westly.
usage_notes: Requires Tribunal and Bloodmoon. Fetcher installs 00 Core and race modules 01 through 12; the alternate 13 EXTRA nude Halfling module is excluded.

name: Tamriel Data Races Playable (Continued)
author: Jetroid
description: Makes the Tamriel Data 25.05 races playable, including Ayleids, Duadri, and Ogres.
usage_notes: Requires Tamriel Data 25.05. Fetcher activates the Ogre version and leaves the mutually exclusive no-Ogre ESP disabled.

name: Zesterer's Volumetric Cloud & Mist Mod for OpenMW
author: zesterer
description: Adds raycasted volumetric clouds, dynamic mist, atmospheric scattering, and related post-processing effects to OpenMW.
usage_notes: Requires post-processing to be enabled in OpenMW. Enable the clouds effect from the F2 post-processing menu; if FXAA is used, place it after clouds. Distant fog should remain disabled.

name: Tiny Transparent Skies for Zesterer's Volumetric Clouds
author: ShulShagana
description: Replaces vanilla weather sky textures with tiny transparent textures so volumetric clouds render without duplicate flat clouds while retaining the night sky.
usage_notes: Download the main file named Tiny Transparent Skies for Volumetric Clouds. The optional Sun Remover is intentionally excluded. This data path must load after vanilla assets and other sky texture replacers.

download_info.file_name: Tiny Transparent Skies for Volumetric Clouds

name: Follower Detection Util (OpenMW)
author: Sosnoviy Bor
description: Provides centralized follower tracking for OpenMW Lua mods.
usage_notes: Required by Best Friends Forever. Load FollowerDetectionUtil.omwscripts before BestFriendsForever.omwscripts.

name: Best Friends Forever (OpenMW)
author: Sosnoviy Bor
description: Adds a follower HUD, catch-up teleportation, speed assistance, and configurable follower immortality.
usage_notes: Requires Follower Detection Util. Fetcher loads both scripts early, with Follower Detection Util first.

name: Scribhammer for Gitshiver
author: FishermanZeddy
description: Adds the Scribhammer mesh, icon, and textures as a modder resource for Gitshiver.
usage_notes: Resource-only archive. It does not add the hammer to the world unless another plugin references the included assets.

name: The Legend of Zelda Beta Mod
author: ModDB uploader
description: Adds Link-inspired playable race content and The Legend of Zelda.ESP.
usage_notes: Manual ModDB download. The installer opens the official page and detects The_Legend_of_Zelda_Beta_Mod.rar in the user's Downloads folder.

name: Secunda Termina and Link Collection
author: blurpandra and original asset authors
description: Installs the Secunda Termina moon replacer, Fargoth as Link, and the fixed Link resource plugin.
usage_notes: Fetcher installs both main files and the Link (Fixed) miscellaneous file from this Nexus page.

name: Face The Moon
author: blurpandra
description: Replaces Baar Dau with a moon-faced model without adding a plugin.
usage_notes: Pluginless replacer. The pinned archive extracts its OpenMW data root under FaceTheMoon/FaceTheMoon/Data.

name: USkele - Morrowind Playable Skeleton Race Mod
author: Nexus mod author
description: Adds a playable skeleton race with meshes, sounds, and skeleton.esp.
usage_notes: The archive also contains an MWSE script, which OpenMW ignores; the playable race plugin and normal assets remain available.

name: Daggerfall Skeleton Sounds
author: Nexus mod author
description: Replaces skeleton creature vocals with Daggerfall-inspired sounds.
usage_notes: Uses the explicitly requested archived Nexus file 1000010954.

name: Held Light Boost
author: THeJUlk
description: Boosts the radius of player-held OpenMW lights while preserving the original light records' appearance and remaining burn time.
usage_notes: Requires OpenMW 0.51.0 or newer. The range multiplier is configurable under Options > Scripts > Held Light Boost.

name: (OpenMW) Fashionwind expanded
author: Hrothgarr123
description: Adds OpenMW-driven visible accessories, circlets, earrings, horns, antlers, and backpacks.
usage_notes: OMWFW_compilation.omwaddon and OMWFW_compilation.omwscripts are mandatory. Fetcher also enables the included horns, antlers, piercing, and earrings addons.

name: Take Control (OpenMW)
author: MomokeCome
description: Adds OpenMW Lua tools for taking control of actors and bundles the modified UI/script dependencies used by the mod.
usage_notes: Experimental modder resource. It bundles modified Inventory Extender, Magic Window Extender, Stats Window, and Yet Another HUD files; test carefully against Fetcher's existing Stats Window Extender.

name: Final Fantasy VII Cloud's Tsurugi Resource
author: DoubleBrewski
description: Adds Cloud's Tsurugi weapon resource meshes, icons, textures, and FF7 Tsurugi Resource.esp.
usage_notes: Old fixed Nexus archive pinned to file 46321.
